faq_intro: Frequently Asked Questions about industrial water purification, OEM manufacturing, NSF/ISO certifications, and global wholesale supply from Express Water — a leading China-based water filter manufacturer since 1998.

faqs.q: Are Express Water filters NSF, CE, ISO and SGS certified?
faqs.a: Yes. All our PP melt-blown, CTO carbon block, GAC, UF membrane, T33 post-carbon and RO membrane cartridges are tested to NSF/ANSI 42, NSF/ANSI 53 and NSF/ANSI 58 standards. Our facility holds ISO 9001:2015 quality certification, CE marking for European export, FDA-grade material declarations, China 3C certification for dispensers, and full SGS heavy-metal & VOC test reports. Halal certification (JAKIM Malaysia) is available for Muslim-market wholesale orders.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ) for OEM/ODM water filter cartridges?
faqs.a: MOQ for standard 10" PP, CTO and GAC cartridges starts at 1,000 pcs per SKU for stock items, 3,000 pcs for OEM-printed sleeves, and 5,000 pcs for fully customized ODM moldings (private end-cap, custom O-ring, branded shrink-wrap). UF membranes and RO 75/100/400 GPD membranes typically MOQ 500 pcs. Wall-mounted dispensers MOQ 100 units. Smaller trial orders are negotiable for new distributors.

faqs.q: Where is your factory located and can buyers visit?
faqs.a: Our manufacturing center is in Yuanhua Town, Haining City, Zhejiang Province, China — approximately 90 minutes by car from Shanghai Hongqiao Airport (SHA) and Hangzhou Xiaoshan Airport (HGH). The 20,000+ m² facility houses dedicated PP melt-blown extrusion lines, sintered carbon block presses, UF/RO membrane assembly clean rooms, and dispenser SMT/assembly lines. We welcome scheduled buyer visits, third-party inspections (SGS, BV, TÜV) and OEM qualification audits.

faqs.q: What lead time should I expect for bulk orders?
faqs.a: Standard PP, CTO, GAC and T33 cartridges in stock colors ship within 7–10 days. OEM private-label cartridges with custom printing: 20–25 days from artwork approval. RO/UF membrane elements: 15–20 days. Wall-mounted and desktop dispensers: 30–45 days depending on customization. Container loading typically 1 × 20'GP (≈ 80,000 cartridges) or 1 × 40'HQ (≈ 200 dispensers). FOB Shanghai or Ningbo; CIF, CFR and DDP terms available.

faqs.q: Do you supply RO membranes for both residential and commercial use?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer full-range reverse osmosis membranes: 50 GPD, 75 GPD, 100 GPD, 200 GPD, 400 GPD, 600 GPD for under-sink residential systems, plus 300 GPD, 400 GPD and 600 GPD high-rejection elements for light commercial water dispensers. Industrial 4040 and 8040 elements (BW30, SW30 equivalents) are available for water treatment plants, dialysis, semiconductor rinse and pharmaceutical applications. Salt rejection rate ≥ 96–99%.

faqs.q: What is the difference between PP melt-blown, CTO carbon block and GAC granular activated carbon filters?
faqs.a: PP melt-blown sediment filters use thermally-bonded polypropylene fibers to remove particulate contaminants (rust, sand, silt) from 0.5 to 50 microns. CTO (Chlorine, Taste & Odor) sintered carbon block filters use compressed coconut-shell or coal-based activated carbon to remove free chlorine, chloramines, VOCs, pesticides and improve taste — typical 5 µm or 10 µm. GAC granular activated carbon filters use loose carbon granules for higher contact-time chlorine adsorption and are often the second stage in 5-stage RO systems. We manufacture all three at industrial scale with full traceability.

faqs.q: Can you produce halal-certified water filtration products for Muslim markets?
faqs.a: Yes. We are an officially recognized halal water filter supplier with JAKIM Malaysia certification. All filter media (activated carbon, mineral balls, KDF, ion-exchange resin) and food-contact components are halal-compliant. We routinely export to Malaysia, Indonesia, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar, Egypt, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Turkey, Morocco and other Muslim-majority markets with halal documentation included.

faqs.q: Do you provide OEM/ODM customization for water dispensers and purifiers?
faqs.a: Absolutely — OEM/ODM is our core specialty. We customize: outer shell color (Pantone matching), front-panel logo silk-screen or laser engraving, LED display language and UI, voltage (110V/220V/240V), plug type (US/UK/EU/AU), packaging (gift box, brown carton, color sleeve), user manual translation, and bundled accessory kits. Tooling cost for new injection molds is typically refundable on order volumes ≥ 5,000 units.

faqs.q: What payment terms and trade terms do you accept?
faqs.a: Standard terms: 30% T/T deposit on order confirmation, 70% balance against B/L copy before shipment. We also accept L/C at sight from prime banks, Western Union and PayPal for sample orders ≤ USD 3,000, and Alibaba Trade Assurance for first-time buyers. Trade terms: EXW Haining, FOB Shanghai/Ningbo, CIF, CFR, DDP and DDU available depending on destination port and incoterm preference.

faqs.q: What is the typical lifespan of your filter cartridges?
faqs.a: Expected service life depends on inlet water quality and daily flow: PP melt-blown sediment filter — 3 to 6 months; CTO carbon block — 6 to 12 months; GAC granular carbon — 6 to 12 months; T33 post-carbon — 12 months; UF ultra-filtration membrane — 24 to 36 months; RO membrane element — 24 to 36 months; mineralization / alkaline T33 — 12 months; cation-resin softening cartridge — 6 to 12 months depending on water hardness. Replacement reminder LED is built into all our smart dispenser models.

faqs.q: Which countries do you currently export to?
faqs.a: We supply to 50+ countries on six continents, with major markets in: USA, Canada, Mexico, Brazil, Argentina, UK, Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Russia, Ukraine, Poland, Turkey, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Egypt, Iran, Pakistan, India, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Indonesia, Malaysia, Vietnam, Thailand, Philippines, South Korea, Japan, Australia, New Zealand, South Africa, Nigeria, Kenya, Tanzania, Morocco, Algeria. Local distributor partnerships and exclusive territory agreements are welcome.

faqs.q: Do you provide reverse osmosis system technical support and after-sales service?
faqs.a: Yes. Every OEM partner receives: complete technical drawings (PDF/DWG), assembly manuals, installation videos, multilingual user manuals (45+ languages available), spare parts list with PN codes, dedicated WhatsApp/email engineering support, and 12 to 24-month limited warranty on housings, membranes and electronic components. On-site engineer dispatch is available for large industrial RO plant commissioning at additional cost.

faqs.q: Can your filter housings handle high-pressure industrial applications?
faqs.a: Yes. We manufacture SUS 304 and SUS 316L food-grade stainless steel filter housings rated up to 16 bar (232 psi) working pressure, with 1", 1.5", 2" and 3" NPT/BSP inlet/outlet options. Big Blue 20" and 30" housings in reinforced PP with brass-insert threads handle up to 8.6 bar (125 psi). All pressure vessels are hydrostatically tested at 1.5× rated pressure before shipment and come with a CE PED 2014/68/EU declaration where applicable.

faqs.q: What raw materials and filter media do you source?
faqs.a: We use only food-grade and NSF-listed materials: virgin polypropylene resin (no recycled PP) for melt-blown and housings; coconut-shell activated carbon (≥ 1100 mg/g iodine value) and bituminous coal carbon for CTO/GAC; PVC and PES hollow-fiber for UF membranes; thin-film composite (TFC) polyamide for RO membranes; food-grade silicone for O-rings; SS 316L for sanitary fittings; FDA-approved ABS and PP for housings; LG Display panels for smart dispensers; certified copper heating elements (where applicable).

faqs.q: How do I request a quotation, samples or product catalog?
faqs.a: Contact us via WhatsApp at +86-19908311885 (24/7 sales support, English/Chinese/Arabic available), email expresswater025@gmail.com, or fill out the inquiry form on our Contact page. Please include: target product (model/specification), quantity, destination country, packaging requirement, and any custom branding needs. Detailed PDF catalog, full product certificates, factory video tour and pricelist will be sent within 24 hours on business days.
